overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through the vibrant countryside of Toussaint. The character traverses a stone bridge over water, passes NPCs, and ascends a winding hillside path through vineyards toward a distant stone tower under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown riverside path approaching stone bridge

agents.ego_description: walking through dense vegetation toward a stone bridge over the river

entered.detail: tall grass and bushes lining the path
stone arch bridge crossing the river ahead
rustic wooden fence posts along the path
calm water visible through the trees
tall stone tower with red roof on the distant hill
snow-capped mountains visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from dense vegetation onto a dirt path leading toward a stone bridge. A wooden fence lines the left side while a river flows nearby. In the distance, a stone tower stands atop a hill against a backdrop of mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge over river with large central tree

events.description: character slows slightly to navigate past fisherman standing on the narrow bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge and carefully passing a fisherman standing near the railing

notable_agents.action: fisherman standing on the bridge holding a fishing rod over the stone railing

entered.detail: low stone walls along the sides of the bridge
massive old tree with wide canopy growing at the bridge exit

segments.scene_description: The character walks onto the cobblestone bridge, passing under the shade of a large spreading tree. A fisherman stands on the right side holding a rod over the stone railing. The river flows beneath as the character approaches the far end of the bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside dirt path alongside wildflower meadows

events.description: character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path, passing another traveler going the opposite way

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with a pack walking toward the bridge in the opposite direction

entered.detail: meadow filled with red poppies and purple flowers
tall narrow evergreen tree standing beside the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge behind, the character walks along an open dirt path bordered by wildflower meadows. A pedestrian passes by heading toward the bridge. The stone tower grows larger in the distance as the path continues through the rolling countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding hillside path through vineyard terraces

events.description: path transitions from flat riverside terrain to ascending hillside through cultivated vineyards

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the winding path through vineyard rows toward the stone tower

entered.detail: terraced rows of grapevines lining the hillside

segments.scene_description: The path begins to wind uphill through terraced vineyards. The stone tower looms larger as the character ascends the slope. The landscape opens up to show rolling hills covered in cultivated rows of grapevines under the bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded wooded path through a riverside village and up into an expansive hillside vineyard. It begins as the character emerges from dense vegetation onto a dirt path lined with wooden fences, moving toward a distant stone tower set against a mountain backdrop. As the path reaches the water, the camera follows the character across a cobblestone bridge beneath the shade of a large tree, passing a fisherman leaning over the railing. The scene then opens into a bright, rolling countryside of wildflower meadows where a pedestrian passes by, while the stone tower grows increasingly prominent in the distance. Finally, the terrain shifts as the path winds uphill through terraced vineyards, ascending the slope toward the looming tower under a bright, open sky.
